textByHash.2987744c086e2c2ca5cf168edb0fc9a6510f0626: If we did, why would we tell you guard?
textByHash.6108d245ff30185899b56c26492053b3f703a864: I spit on Khazard's grave, and all who do his bidding.
textByHash.8a8844a7cabcbb7a71014619a720dc235b23519c: I have heard of those of whom you speak. But I fear it may be too late.
textByHash.3020260700d16d639d7750b4cd9a6775af5f1e4c: You're a brave man. If the guards get you, you'll be in here next.
textByHash.1e674ea7a59c6a125b8fce347e64399ac1333c85: You're a brave woman. If the guards get you, you'll be in here next.
textByHash.f4661cc6bc95d20eaa7fc92ebf3f2897d2d6e951: Until our last breath, our every action will be against Khazard. Never will we help you.
textByHash.aed9d95e5faac1f2829125e411fa509e2160e837: It is said that Khazard has a personal vendetta against those two, their time is therefore short.
textByHash.b4f3105ef310e666d57204ccf91040cb20109e01: Get away, get away. One day I'll have my revenge, and I'll have all your heads.
textByHash.199952d3359c1d01848ff2feab42e9903e206be8: Spare me your fake pity. I spit on Khazard's grave, and all who do his bidding.
textByHash.4edbf9b8ba056e428ef13eb9130a84f8fd6d9632: You're not safe here traveller. Leave while you still can
textByHash.35d28945c92956909bb10a2a3e5ac42eae4827d9: You're a brave person. If the guards get you, you'll be in here next.
textByHash.caa7827154a94738ab00703d09d7097fbbdb93af: If we did, why would we tell a guard?
textByHash.d33212033606037d81114178ab18d13aa1c33182: I spit on Khazard, and all who do his bidding.
textByHash.f37a7267a48075b45b49c111af9d3f1f06c1a273: I've heard of them, but if your hope is to help them, I fear you may be too late.
textByHash.805ef8e710fd8db01573f83c9741596e18d95352: Hi, I'm Joe, door guard for Lady Keli.
textByHash.5025e5ea47efe1b8cbf95484e203c115a235dd3b: Can't say, all very secret. You should get out of here. I am not supposed to talk while I guard.
textByHash.24e66e6e93a1f5eca0721afa9f4f73275123276e: Ah, that would be lovely, just one now, just to wet my throat.
textByHash.3f9c06e518e84533c71e1c8a9237482864723758: That was perfect, I can't thank you enough.
textByHash.0953248211ab0fd7b641dea0f2027ab2ed70bdf6: No, I don't get drunk with only one drink. You would need a few to do that. But thanks for the beer.
textByHash.ee74d0eff883f04af4aaeed919da9e82908e9705: I better not, I don't want to be drunk on duty.
textByHash.3c141536aa6b26a3ca4b8a5f5051cb50ac14dafd: Franksh, that wash just what I need to shtay on guard. No more beersh, I don't want to get drunk.
textByHash.1cacea545c11b561ef99e5c23ab832f310212511: .... But most of those hours are a drag. If only I had spent more time in Knight school when I was a young boy. Maybe I wouldn't be here now, scared of Keli.
textByHash.6c19717a72229a1fe8f7b54b72bbd7c9df27b60f: You never relax with these people, but it's a good career for a young man and some of the shouting I rather like.
textByHash.a957762fdb92074cf23e5818cc56f231783b65ee: Really, after working here, there's only time for a drink or three. All us guards go to the same bar and drink ourselves stupid.
textByHash.d332893dd8ede9f48297ddc78d1258e8f49141da: It's what I enjoy these days, that fade into unconciousness. I can't resist the sight of a really cold beer.
textByHash.f26b76d49db47a2a9f3b4a812e05e96a35228ddc: Well, I loved to sit by the lake, with my toes in the water and shoot the fish with my bow and arrow.
textByHash.a8b686b81fbfcdfccbd0ec59eb74faab010c6021: It kept us from goblin hunting, which was what most boys did. What are you here for?
textByHash.c5c9da1b49865f6cfb0c234438984fd55d33388f: WHAT?! Are you trying to bribe me? I may not be a great guard, but I am loyal. How DARE you try to bribe me!
textByHash.63ff2ac7581d63903536315344b51fea99aafcf7: Oh. Sorry. No, I don't need money. As long as you were not offering me a bribe.
textByHash.e37915740432069f3c712ccd4302e358d0587285: Thanks, I appreciate that. Talking on duty can be punishable by having your mouth stitched up. These are tough people, no mistake.
textByHash.2dae08707d3a916450fadaf282f0ffe8987e9dde: Thatsh a funny joke. You are lucky I am shober. Go in peace, friend.
textByHash.8620be19f9dec520538b1401b986fc2a14cc088e: Halt! Who goes there? Friend or foe?
textByHash.2afb3c3bee845b5dede1ccedee3e057f7a8ac478: The Prince got away, I am in trouble. I better not talk to you, they are not sure I was drunk.
textByHash.eb9e3146d4943bb0633a952fd3e9c91877923bf1: Can't say. It's all very secret. You should get out of here. I am not supposed to talk while I guard.
textByHash.f04c4989315b1c626845b47777369b07be4edb5c: Ah, that would be lovely. Only one though, just to wet my throat.
textByHash.38c5b9820988c25f61ad1d3c7645026ac3d089af: That was perfect! I can't thank you enough.
textByHash.e074d2d496a5b70e1bc882d37c7f36357e48c253: No, I don't get drunk from only one drink. I reckon I'd need at least two more for that. Still, thanks for the beer.
textByHash.5ae3fc82d226134dd889c50c9f09545609e68dd0: I'd better not. I don't want to be drunk on duty.
textByHash.3ac6f46162d41dcc836a96e7133c560951361bf3: Franksh! That wash jusht what I need to shtay on guard. No more beersh, I don't want to get drunk.
textByHash.33f5cdd11da2678c16e068b81f426d38e012d811: Well, the hours are good, but most of those hours are a drag.
textByHash.8d07ad6337fa6df28e9a81449755d8f0b3ad01f5: Sometimes I wonder if I should have spent more time learning when I was a young boy. Maybe I wouldn't be here now, scared of Keli.
textByHash.8bbbae3813fc4e1bba8b3f642b0cc33127baabf1: Well, I loved to sit by the lake, with my toes in the water. I'd shoot the fish with my bow and arrow.
textByHash.4d034b53bb598148429d5f4265b2b3809611d8fb: It kept us from goblin hunting, which was what most boys did.
textByHash.90d9b650f093912db841a66f7eb6da6c2d8b3508: Hang on... Why do you ask? What do you want?
textByHash.e0e1d7d535885edef596b1caaf7cfc0566327a9d: Sorry, it's hard to relax when I'm on duty. Stress of the job, and all.
textByHash.99282aed0690311008fb09f2ad31f46d4f1afd90: There's good money in it, and some of the shouting I rather like.
textByHash.bb144a1b4117433cd78d527a64304db56543e13d: Really, after working here, there's only time for a drink or three. All us guards go to the same pub and drink ourselves stupid.
textByHash.724e3ac47963cccb7c92a34402b784c4656ddd84: It's what I enjoy these days. I can't resist the sight of a really cold beer.
textByHash.c10603afa974b232f7163c54e1260db31d3e9674: What? Are you trying to bribe me? I may not be a great guard, but I am loyal. How dare you try to bribe me!
textByHash.ca34ed16b2cf8a12ce8aa2657c597911ae34be1b: Oh... sorry. No, I don't need money. As long as you were not offering me a bribe.
textByHash.35f4d39f7386dd7d313033794766870263b20fa0: Thanks, I appreciate that. Talking on duty can be punished by having your mouth stitched up. These are tough people, make no mistake.
textByHash.0b11861eeb7caff6cb15234bd64633a29dc1f6eb: Thatsh a funny joke. You are lucky I'm shober. Go in peace, friend.
textByHash.ccccc0a35d621109ffaabf07f5ef5e3dd16c38e2: Did yoush say something about shome Prince?
textByHash.340cc8997b1dac8d5dbe98436250965f206ca780: Arr? Be ye wantin' te go on account with our gang o' fillibusters?
textByHash.e2d61a45774331b987e1966d6c9f24c8fb21c116: The powder monkey be takin' a caulk after gettin' rowdy on bumboo, so there be plenty of room for ye.
textByHash.018da29f4625d94230c5dbd2ddcc6729c5702e7c: We gots grog and we gots food. Here, take a look.
textByHash.d46addff2d2b40c960e05254e6dde36723b1d9e3: Then stop takin' up me floor space!
textByHash.0988f5979d5db59c8aa1461c6492d5d35d9bafe8: Well, if ye wants te hear the story, here goes.
textByHash.4dd56cc2503d85effc3e14ae7f92b25452b22b34: See, I was walkin' along the docks one day, and this fierce storm blew up.
textByHash.493588da07e68a8c06a1de45ec1548897a3f9e00: All of a sudden I turn an there, bearin' down on me is this albatross...
textByHash.46476aedda72a924e73032425f1b675efd1fefda: What? I was just gettin' to the good bit.
textByHash.55f401cb12402ca37dda7fb3204a77386fd549f8: If ye don't wants to hear the story then I ain't gonna tell ye!
